name: @ai-v-models/plugin-caveman
description: Token compression — make AI talk like caveman. Why use many token when few do trick.

avm-plugin.name: Caveman
avm-plugin.description: Compress AI output tokens by ~65% using caveman-style terse communication. Why use many token when few do trick.

level.label: Compression level
level.description: lite: drop filler words | full: classic caveman | ultra: telegraphic | wenyan: classical Chinese
